verdict_reason: Test covers the ticket AC comprehensively but lacks Given/When/Then blocks and misses a return value assertion in one test method.

todos.issue: Missing Given/When/Then comment blocks in test methods
todos.fix: Add explicit // Given, // When, // Then comment blocks to each test method for clarity, per best practices
Add assertThat(outboxPublishService.publishUnpublishedEvents()).isEqualTo(2) to verify the correct count of published events is returned
